title: Career Pathways: Matthew Piscoya
summary: BSNC descendant Matthew Piscoya is a First Lieutenant in the United States Marine Corps and is currently stationed in Corpus Christi, Texas at Marine Aviation Training Support Group 22. He has been training on the T-6B Texan II, and T-44C Pegasus aircraft in the multi-engine, fixed wing program in perpetration to...

title: The AI Alaska Music Show
summary: Yes, you read that right. Using classic poetry about Alaska, plenty of self-promotion and raw nerve, we present the first AI Alaska Music Podcast. Let us know what you think about all this at www.nightworksmedia.com

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 4, 2024
summary: July 4, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a greater rate of 6.88 % (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 5.31%), from the level on 06/27/2024 of 10.097 M km 2 to 9.402 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager...
